description.value:
A powerful siege-weight crossbow that punches through armor and knocks enemies off their feet. Skilled users can react to enemies trying to close or escape, turning the weapon into a battlefield deterrent.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d8 (100/400), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d10+4 (100/400), Reload bonus, Keen, Puncture, Sighted, Trip
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d10+4 (100/400), Reload bonus, Keen, Puncture, Sighted, Trip â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkAs a reaction, you may make an attack against a creature that enters or leaves a space within 10 ft of you.

rmeData.masterPerk: As a reaction, you may make an attack against a creature that enters or leaves a space within 10 ft of you.
